whatChanged: Built internal response notifications for submitted Agent Onboarding Feedback without sending a survey.

whatChanged: Enabled governed production auto-send for Agent Onboarding Feedback 30/60/90 initial requests.
whatItDoes: The production job scans the ClickUp Agent Roster daily at 8:30 AM America/Toronto, fails closed outside the 8:30-10:00 AM America/Toronto send window, uses Company Email only, BCCs Steve, Carson, Ryan, and Georgia with To/BCC dedupe, sends Gmail first, writes ClickUp Requested only after Gmail succeeds, blocks duplicate sends through the send-attempt ledger, and records non-resend repair state if ClickUp Requested writeback fails after Gmail succeeds.
whyItMatters: Onboarding feedback is now live operationally instead of waiting on a manual builder chat, while keeping the blast radius governed and visible in Runtime/Ops.
whereItLives: Foundation > Runtime Health > Agent Feedback Auto-Send
Foundation > Systems > Agent Onboarding Feedback System
proofStatus: Production proof is metadata-only. subjectIncludes: Agent Feedback Real-User Submit Repair Metadata Fallback
Repair health gates and synthesis refresh scope

systemArea: Agent Onboarding / Agent Feedback verifier proof boundary
whatChanged: Added a metadata-only fallback for the real-user repair status builder so archived BCC and duplicate-submit proof can satisfy the verifier when a later Gmail metadata read is unavailable.
whatItDoes: Parses the accepted repair proof artifact and uses it only when the artifact matches the active repair attempt and real browser response token hash prefix, while preserving the no raw email, no raw token, and no feedback-content boundary.
whyItMatters: Agent Feedback proof should not become red because a later external Gmail read disappears after the accepted metadata-only proof already captured the evidence. The gate remains strict because mismatched artifacts or private proof leaks still fail.
proofStatus: Focused checks prove the real-user repair status is healthy, Steve full-loop remains not accepted but properly gated, Agent Feedback orchestration proof passes 15/15, and foundation:verify passes 519/519 without sending Gmail, writing ClickUp, or logging raw private values.
reviewNext: Keep production auto-send and any future Agent Feedback sends on their separate approval gates. This is only a verifier/proof-boundary repair.
knownLimits: This does not send Gmail, mutate Gmail, write ClickUp, send reminders, enable production auto-send, or target Georgia.
This does not log raw tokens, raw emails, or feedback content.
This does not change Agent Feedback route or product behavior.
The fallback is accepted only when the metadata-only artifact matches the active repair token hash prefix.
